title: Trustpilot Negative Reviews Scraper Input
description: Search for businesses on Trustpilot by keyword or industry, or provide direct URLs. Extract negative reviews with configurable star rating filter.

keyword.title: Search Keyword
keyword.description: Search term to find businesses on Trustpilot. For example, 'insurance', 'web hosting', or a specific company name.

industry.title: Industry Category
industry.description: Filter businesses by industry category on Trustpilot.

startUrls.title: Start URLs
startUrls.description: Direct Trustpilot business profile URLs to scrape. Use this to target specific businesses instead of searching by keyword or industry.

country.title: Country Filter
country.description: Filter businesses by country using an ISO country code (e.g., US, GB, DE, FR, AU).

maxStarRating.title: Maximum Star Rating
maxStarRating.description: Reviews with this star rating or lower will be extracted as negative reviews. For example, set to 3 to capture 1-star, 2-star, and 3-star reviews.

minTrustScore.title: Minimum Trust Score
minTrustScore.description: Only scrape businesses with a TrustScore at or above this value. Set to 0 to disable this filter and scrape all businesses regardless of their score.

minReviewCount.title: Minimum Review Count
minReviewCount.description: Only scrape businesses that have at least this many total reviews. Set to 0 to disable this filter.

maxReviewsPerBusiness.title: Max Reviews Per Business
maxReviewsPerBusiness.description: Maximum number of negative reviews to collect per business. Useful for limiting output size when scraping many businesses.

maxRequestsPerCrawl.title: Max Requests Per Crawl
maxRequestsPerCrawl.description: Maximum number of HTTP requests the crawler will make. This acts as a safety limit to prevent excessive usage.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings for the scraper. Trustpilot may block requests without proxies.
